---
title: "Palette Extraction"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Palette Extraction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

Palette extraction clusters source pixels and reports color frequency.

```{r}
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))
pal <- extract_image_palette(img, n = 8, colorspace = "Lab")
pal
plot_image_palette(pal)
```
